item.title: Labor Secretary's husband barred from HQ after claims he sexually assaulted women there: MS Now
item.description: The Labor Department's inspector general is investigating the situation, and a complaint has been made to police in Washington, D.C., the report said.

item.title: Epstein files: Former prince Andrew released by police, Trump calls his arrest 'a shame'
item.description: President Donald Trump said the arrest of Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, the brother of King Charles III, was "very sad" and "so bad for the royal family...

item.title: Epstein would 'name drop' Trump, Les Wexner says in deposition video
item.description: Democrats on the House Oversight Committee have expressed skepticism about Wexner's insistence that he had virtually no social life with Epstein.

item.title: Kennedy defends Trump glyphosate order; MAHA erupts as midterms approach
item.description: President Donald Trump on Wednesday invoked the Defense Production Act to spur the domestic production of glyphosate and elemental phosphorus.

item.title: House Democrats call for Treasury probe into Trump family crypto venture
item.description: World Liberty Financial drew scrutiny after it was revealed an Emirati royal known as the "Spy Sheikh" purchased a $500 million stake in the company l...
